description:
A barcode scanner that checks if products are vegan or vegetarian.

Vegan Inspector is an app that quickly and easily shows you whether a product is vegan or vegetarian.

Features:

  • Barcode scanner: Scan a product's barcode and instantly get information about its vegan or vegetarian status.
  • Minimalist user interface: Just the essentials: scanner and results.
  • Open API & data sources: Our API is open source and draws data from OpenFoodFacts, with additional sources to be added in the future.

Network access:

The app only connects to the internet when a barcode is scanned. No connections are made on startup or in the background. The following services are contacted:

  • api.vegan-inspector.app: the open-source backend API that looks up / proxies product data
  • images.openfoodfacts.org / static.openfoodfacts.org: product images and data from OpenFoodFacts
